author: PC Gamer
text:
Cairn revolutionizes bragging rights, lets you print a shirt showing your playthrough ascent from an in-game menu
You'll be the talk of the town.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Loot is too good in co-op RPG Fellowship, so its devs are trying to convince players why making it worse is better
Fellowship's limited build variety is about to change for the better.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Now that Subnautica 2 is out, the most wishlisted game on Steam is… a game that's been out for almost 2 years?
It's Schrödinger's game: it is both unreleased and yet one of the most popular games on Steam.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core launch times and release date
Management's calling in the big guns.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hasbro cancelled a D&D game from the Jedi: Fallen Order director
Giant Skull and Stig Asmussen aren't making a Dungeons and Dragons game after all.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders says our bad with those gun durability nerfs, reinforces a bunch of weapons by up to 54%
And welcome the Rascal grenade launcher to the party.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Half-Life owes its existence to one of the game industry's most formative figures—no, not Gabe Newell, the other guy
Before there was Gabe, there was Ken Williams, and he played a significant role in bringing Half-Life into the world.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Struggling Witcher spinoff brings acclaimed Destiny 2 narrative veteran onboard as new lead writer
Kwan Perng was the narrative lead on The Final Shape, arguably Destiny 2's best expansion.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Cairn revolutionizes bragging rights, lets you print a shirt showing your playthrough ascent from an in-game menu
You'll be the talk of the town.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Loot is too good in co-op RPG Fellowship, so its devs are trying to convince players why making it worse is better
Fellowship's limited build variety is about to change for the better.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Now that Subnautica 2 is out, the most wishlisted game on Steam is… a game that's been out for almost 2 years?
It's Schrödinger's game: it is both unreleased and yet one of the most popular games on Steam.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core launch times and release date
Management's calling in the big guns.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hasbro cancelled a D&D game from the Jedi: Fallen Order director
Giant Skull and Stig Asmussen aren't making a Dungeons and Dragons game after all.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders says our bad with those gun durability nerfs, reinforces a bunch of weapons by up to 54%
And welcome the Rascal grenade launcher to the party.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Half-Life owes its existence to one of the game industry's most formative figures—no, not Gabe Newell, the other guy
Before there was Gabe, there was Ken Williams, and he played a significant role in bringing Half-Life into the world.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Struggling Witcher spinoff brings acclaimed Destiny 2 narrative veteran onboard as new lead writer
Kwan Perng was the narrative lead on The Final Shape, arguably Destiny 2's best expansion.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Troy Baker and Austin Wintory talk becoming Indiana Jones and writing death metal polkas for Counter-Strike
The key to a great artistic collaboration? Saying yes to every wild idea.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Assassin's Creed: Black Flag star Matt Ryan says the term 'voice actor' is outdated: 'You see the performances in the eyes, it blows me away'
"We need to rejig the vernacular."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Microsoft says it's going to 'fundamentally raise the bar' on driver quality, reliability and security across Windows
Start your engines.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Paralives looks packed with tiny features I've been desperately wanting in The Sims for years
I'm giddy for all these features I could never get from an unmodded Sims.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Tom Kane, voice actor whose work spanned Star Wars: KOTOR to The Powerpuff Girls' dad, dies aged 64
"His voice became part of our lives, our memories, and the stories we carry with us."

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get all Biomods in Subnautica 2, and what each one does
Scan fish, get rewarded.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Interpol's 'Operation Ramz' has arrested over 200 people for phishing scams, malware threats, and security breaches
Knock knock, it's the cyber police.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to repair the Power Plant and enter the Observatory in Subnautica 2
You've got a big job on your hands.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Razer Kiyo V2 review
There's nothing wrong with the Kiyo V2, but nothing right enough to beat out the competition.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Party Animals' studio finally cancels its AI video contest and promises to approach topics like this in the future 'with a much more humble and cautious attitude'
"We would like to offer our deepest apologies to all players."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam killed its 'RPGMaker' user tag yesterday, and impacted devs are unexpectedly happy about it
It maybe obscured more than it revealed.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel is reportedly forcing PC builders to buy its latest, most expensive 18A CPUs and I'm wondering what that means for Arrow Lake desktop chips
There are no Intel 18A desktop CPUs, so what are we meant to buy?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Discord just got the privacy feature it probably should have had for years, introducing end-to-end encryption for very nearly every voice and video call
"Likely one of the internet’s most platform-diverse E2EE voice and video implementations."

author: PC Gamer
text:
World's largest film archive has a collection of internet memes now, including a granny having a cathartic GTA rampage and Limmy's Purple Burglar Alarm
A collection of delightful nonsense.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2's EULA is so severe that even this news story breaks it
Sorry, Krafton, I'm a bad, bad boy.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Survival RPG Outward 2 will run just fine on 'potato' settings, and as proof, here's testimony from an actual potato
The survival RPG sequel is coming to early access in July.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I can't believe a tabletop RPG based on Ubisoft's The Division has proved to be so popular
The Division is coming to tables later this year.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders' new trader comes to Speranza stacked with cosmetics, premium currency, and blueprints
Everyone say hi to Ermal.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Microsoft announces plans to give you more control over the Windows 11 taskbar and Start menu
Top, bottom, left and right.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get the Rascal in Arc Raiders
There's a surprise new gun in the Nomadic Envoys update, the Rascal.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy creator Sakaguchi praises AI slop trailer for a FF6 remake, earns himself a light ribbing from battle designer on the first 2 games
Fin-AI-l Fantasy.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Microsoft continues to build towards a passwordless future by phasing out an authentication method that's become 'a leading source of fraud'
Bad news for forgetful folks like me.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Cairn revolutionizes bragging rights, lets you print a shirt showing your playthrough ascent from an in-game menu
You'll be the talk of the town.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Critical Role finally releases a full-scale map of Campaign 4's main city, and I'm deeply jealous to not have their personal cartographer at my table
The inevitable Aramán campaign setting is gonna slap.

author: PC Gamer
text:
If gaming laptops are just too bulky for you and you're desperate to burn an enormous hole in your wallet, the new Asus ROG NUC is surely a vision of your dreams
For me, it's a vision of hell.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'If engineers are becoming three or four times more productive, then we just [want to] do three or four times more stuff': Google DeepMind CEO reckons AI-induced job cuts aren't inevitable
He also says there's 'something missing' from AI game development.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Backrooms actor Chiwetel Ejiofor was surprised to find out the 30,000 square foot set is the first of its kind: 'I thought that somewhere it had been built before'
Those shorts do look pretty convincing to be fair.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Microsoft plans to launch a cheaper 8 GB Surface laptop later this year which won't meet the requirements of a Copilot+ PC
How far we have fallen.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Mass Effect-like Exodus 'is effectively D&D in space,' Hasbro CEO says
I guess you could make that argument, but I sure wouldn't.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Embracer Group cuts itself into pieces, this is its last resort: Bifurcation, new listing—licensing out Kain and JC Denton
Would it be wrong? Would it be right? If I put Middle-earth on the NASDAQ tonight?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Bhashiva's tiger warriors are an addition to Total War: Warhammer 3 worth the money and the wait
Plus you can ally with Chrace for their white lions and Kislev for bears then finally have an army of lions and tigers and bears, oh my.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 devs have heard your 'strong request' for combat, but it's not going to happen: 'Subnautica has always been built around vulnerability, exploration, and survival'
Unknown Worlds says it's not "because we think those players are wrong," but Subnautica 2 just isn't that kind of game.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Tech leaker suggests that AMD has a Ryzen 7 7700X3D lined up in the wings but if the specs are correct, it'll need to be genuinely cheap to sell well
Who's upgrading to AM5 these days when DDR5 is so stupidly expensive?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Arc Raiders has added Denuvo anticheat 'initially to a limited player pool' after a successful rollout in The Finals
This is part of a continued effort to improve fair play.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'AI Mode has been a revelation, our biggest upgrade to Search ever. People love it,' says Google CEO
But I still think there's an AI industry bubble that could burst.

author: PC Gamer
text:
TSMC employees can now buy company-branded shoes modelled by CEO C.C. Wei, or a chip-themed rice cooker with a 'wafer-shaped steaming plate'
Where do I sign up?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Herman Miller introduces its first ever gaming desk and, needless to say, it is gorgeous but lavishly expensive
Just a dash of colour ties it together.

author: PC Gamer
text:
81-year-old Minecraft streamer swatted while raising money for grandson's cancer treatment
GrammaCrackers says she's 'Never had that much attention in my life.'

author: PC Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy 11 expected a 'sharp player decline' once the hype from the FF14 crossover and welcome back campaigns ended, but that never came
The 24-year-old MMO is trucking along just fine.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel chief: 'In the past, we made a lot of mistakes... from day one I came on board as CEO, I have all the engineering report to me'
Go see the boss.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Valorant gets Anti-Lag 2 but after testing it I don't think users with high-end AMD rigs should crack open the champagne
Lower-end rigs might have more to gain.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The rumours were true: Kingdom Come studio is working on an RPG set in Tolkien's Middle-earth
Eru Iluvatar be praised!
